nasb.text: “Only the tribe of Levi you shall not number, nor shall you take their census among the sons of Israel.

esv.text: “Only the tribe of Levi you shall not list, and you shall not take a census of them among the people of Israel.

cnv.text: “只有利未支派，你不可數點，也不可把他們的總數列入以色列人中。

ccb.text: “你不要统计利未支派的人数，不要把他们的人数算在以色列人中。
